title: Component Compatibility Contract
description:
Declares the dependency surface and API/capability surface of a catalog component. Lives as compatibility.yaml next to helm/ + manifests/ and ships with the OCI artifact.

Schema-contract-parity decisions (rules/schema-contract-parity.md):
1. Closed-vs-open: closed via additionalProperties:false on provides[] items — hygiene and the explicit reject-apis threat-model (a legacy 'apis' key under provides[] fails validation).
2. Duplicate-key behavior: duplicate top-level keys are a YAML authoring error; readers treat the file as corrupt and surface it, not silently last-wins.
3. No schema version field — evolution tracked via git history under harness-evolution review (rules/review-rigor.md 2-round R2 minimum).
4. compatibility.yaml is repo-internal trusted data — no untrusted-data sentinel applies.
5. Per-field mutability: 'requires' and 'provides' are mutable-in-place (version bumps, new capabilities). 'crd-bearing' is mutable-in-place.

Note: structural typing only. sot<->payload consistency (e.g. sot:app requires app: to be set) and render-parity are owned by task lint:version, not this schema.

crd-bearing.description: Marks the CRD-bearing half of a strict-B pair (ADR-0028). When true, the validate:crd-split gate asserts kind:CustomResourceDefinition count > 0 in the rendered artifact.

requires.description: Component and capability dependencies. Keys are either '<sub-layer>/<component>' (version range of another catalog component) or a capability id from catalog/capability-index.yaml. Empty {} is allowed (no dependencies).

provides.description: The API and capability surface this component publishes. Each entry is one named unit (one Helm release, one Crossplane package, etc.).

name.description: The component or package name published by this entry.

version.description: Provenance version block (optional — unbuilt stubs carry no version block; lint:version skips version-less components by design). Structural typing only: sot<->payload consistency is owned by lint:version.

sot.description: The provenance source-of-truth axis. 'app' = running workload version; 'chart' = Helm chart packaging version; 'crd-schema' = CRD schema version; 'none' = built component with no trackable provenance axis.

app.description: Version of the running workload (app-version axis). Present when sot is 'app' or when the chart also carries a distinct app version.

chart.description: Helm chart packaging version. Present when sot is 'chart' or when both app and chart versions are tracked.

crd_schema.description: CRD schema version sourced from the upstream operator. Present when sot is 'crd-schema'.

artifacts.description: Full multi-image cardinality for components that ship more than one image (e.g. hubble, democratic-csi). Each entry is one image with its version.

version.description: Image tag or digest for this artifact.

api_surface.description: CRD API groups or API surfaces exposed by this component. Empty array allowed (most components expose no additional API surface).

capabilities.description: Swappable capabilities this component implements. Optional — omit entirely for components that carry no capability mapping (e.g. lifecycle/providers). Empty [] for deliberate no-capability design state.

swap_class.description: Migration class when swapping implementations. Valid values are owned by catalog/capability-index.yaml (not enum-constrained here to avoid schema drift).

role.description: Role within a multi-component capability (e.g. proxydhcp for bare-metal-boot). Valid values are owned by catalog/capability-index.yaml.
